configurePresets.name: vcpkg
configurePresets.description: Configures with the vcpkg toolchain file. Requires the VCPKG_ROOT environment variable to point at a vcpkg checkout (https://github.com/microsoft/vcpkg).

configurePresets.name: vcpkg-windows-vs2026
configurePresets.description: Requires CMake >= 4.2 (the 'Visual Studio 18 2026' generator was added in 4.2; VS 2026 currently bundles an older CMake, so install a newer CMake separately if needed).
